messages.content: Please translate in American English, in the most compact form, the following Romanian text: “20 Litri BENZINĂ AUTO REGULAR"
20 liters of regular gasoline
Please translate in American English, in the most compact form, the following Romanian text: “20 Litri BENZINĂ AUTO PREMIUM"
20 liters of premium auto gasoline.
Please translate in American English, in the most compact form, the following Romanian text: “20 LITRI MOTORINĂ"
20 liters of diesel.
Please translate in American English, in the most compact form, the following Romanian text: “Filigran RSR drept (detaliu)"
RSR watermark straight (detail)
Please translate in American English, in the most compact form, the following Romanian text: “Prefixul seriei este X"
Series prefix is X.
Please translate in American English, in the most compact form, the following Romanian text: “Marcaj ștampilat: PREȚ CU AMĂNUNTUL"
Stamped marking: Retail price.
Please translate in American English, in the most compact form, the following Romanian text: “Negru + roz închis/oranj"
Black + dark pink/orange.
Please translate in American English, in the most compact form, the following Romanian text: “Gri închis + bleu si oranj deschis"
Dark gray + blue and light orange.
Please translate in American English, in the most compact form, the following Romanian text: “Gri albăstrui + bleu-gri/cafeniu-gălbui deschis pal sau bej-gălbui"
Bluish gray + bluish-gray/light brownish-yellow or pale beige-yellow.

Please translate in American English, in the most compact form, the following Romanian text: “Ștampila rectangulară a unitaților de profil de teritoriu S.C. PECO S.A. cu text BENZINĂ PREMIUM și preț exprimat în LEI (perioadă inflaționistă"
Rectangular stamp of the territorial profile units of S.C. PECO S.A. with text PREMIUM GASOLINE and price expressed in LEI (inflationary period).
Please translate in American English, in the most compact form, the following Romanian text: “roz/cafeniu pal gălbui"
Pale pink/light brownish-yellow.
